element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Default weapon; establishes ranged attack pattern

typical_tension_triggers: Multi-path decision points under time limit
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: High-intensity action platformer with large open-ended levels encouraging exploration; tension sustained through time limits, enemy encounters, and resource scarcity; relief provided by powerup collection and transformation abilities

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Large open-ended level design with multiple paths to goal; encourages exploration for powerups and multipliers

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction to movement, basic projectile combat, and enemy patterns; single-path awareness with scattered powerups
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy density; introduction of transformation abilities expanding traversal options; multi-path routing becomes critical to time management
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex enemy combinations; hazardous terrain integration; transformation sequences required for progression; time pressure peaks
notable_spikes: Levels requiring terrain alteration for progression
Boss encounters or significant enemy clusters

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Point A to Point B with Time Limit
notable_level_patterns.description: Primary level objective structure; large, open-ended environment with multiple viable paths; emphasis on route optimization under time pressure
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All 16 levels follow this core structure

notable_level_patterns.description: Weapon and transformation pickups unlock access to previously impassable terrain or enemy types; encourages exploration and backtracking
Levels offer horizontal and vertical routing options; player choice between difficulty and time efficiency affects multiplier collection and survival
